summary: Complete testing of Archer clarification two-step approach. STEP 1: Archer Question Card shows max 1 question with 2-3 clickable answer buttons + 'Archer has more questions — ask him directly →' link. STEP 2: Clicking link opens CaseChatDrawer (400px, slides from right) pre-loaded with case context. Chat uses /api/chat/send with case_id field. Backend uses emergentintegrations LlmChat (NOT direct httpx to Anthropic).

ui_bugs.issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge intercepts pointer events on send button in some viewport positions
ui_bugs.note: Chat still works via Enter key or initial message auto-send. Badge is external overlay.

1_archer_question_card_dashboard.evidence: Archer Question Card found on Dashboard with data-testid='archer-question'

3_ask_archer_directly_link.evidence: Link with data-testid='ask-archer-directly' found below answer buttons

4_chat_drawer_opens_from_dashboard.evidence: Clicking link opens drawer with data-testid='case-chat-drawer'

5_chat_drawer_400px_right_slide.evidence: Drawer has width: 400px, position: absolute right: 0, animation: slideIn

6_chat_drawer_has_archer_avatar.evidence: Archer avatar (J) found in drawer header

7_chat_drawer_has_case_title.evidence: 'Chat with Archer' title with case subtitle visible

9_chat_drawer_preloaded_context.evidence: Initial message sent automatically with case title and Archer's question

10_chat_drawer_close_button.evidence: data-testid='close-chat-drawer' closes drawer, user stays on same page

11_case_detail_archer_question_card.evidence: Archer Question Card found on /cases/{case_id} page

12_case_detail_chat_drawer.evidence: Chat drawer opens from CaseDetail page with same functionality

13_backend_chat_send_with_case_id.evidence: POST /api/chat/send accepts case_id field, Archer responds with case context

backend_tests.test_chat_send_without_case_id: PASS - General chat works without case context
backend_tests.test_chat_send_with_case_id: PASS - Chat includes case context when case_id provided
backend_tests.test_chat_send_continues_conversation: PASS - Multiple messages in same conversation work
backend_tests.test_archer_question_structure: PASS - archer_question has text and 2-3 options

critical_code_review_comments: CaseChatDrawer.js correctly implements 400px slide-in drawer with animation
Dashboard.js and CaseDetail.js both integrate chatDrawer state and CaseChatDrawer component
Backend /api/chat/send (line 4358) correctly accepts case_id and passes to send_chat_message
send_chat_message (line 4446) builds case context from case_doc when case_id provided
Chat uses LlmChat from emergentintegrations (line 4519), NOT direct httpx to Anthropic
FIXED: Added missing English translation for 'moreQuestions' in Dashboard.js (line 72)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data with 29 cases
context_for_next_testing_agent: Archer clarification two-step approach is fully implemented. STEP 1: Archer Question Card shows max 1 question with 2-3 answer buttons + 'ask directly' link. STEP 2: CaseChatDrawer slides in from right (400px) with case context. The drawer uses /api/chat/send which passes case_id to include case context in Archer's responses. Backend uses emergentintegrations LlmChat (not direct Anthropic calls). Fixed missing English translation for 'moreQuestions' in Dashboard.js.
screenshots: .screenshots/dashboard_loaded.png - Dashboard with Archer Question Card visible
.screenshots/archer_question_card.png - Archer Question Card with 3 answer buttons and 'ask directly' link
.screenshots/chat_drawer_opened.png - CaseChatDrawer open with initial context message
.screenshots/case_detail_page.png - CaseDetail page with Archer Question Card
